subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose book hath come before Our face, that this remembrance may draw him nigh unto a station wherein naught is beheld save the manifestation of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه لدی الوجه لیقربه الذکر الی مقام لا یری فیه الا ظهور الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment
